name: Arni Me Patates Ragu (Lamb & Potatoes Rag
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash and dry the meat; cut into 1 1/2-inch chunks; lightly season with salt and pepper.
2. In a large pot, melt butter over medium heat.
3. Add the lamb pieces and brown well on all sides. Remove the lamb and set aside in a deep dish.
4. Add chopped onion to the pot and cook until it browns.
5. Add carrot and parsley, and cook until wilted.
6. Add tomatoes; bring to a boil.
7. Return the meat to the pot and add 1 cup of hot water. Partially cook over low heat for about 30 minutes.
8. While the lamb is cooking, peel potatoes and cut into 2 or 3 pieces.
9. Add the potato pieces to the pot.
10. Season with a little salt and pepper, and continue cooking until the potatoes are tender and most of the liquid has been absorbed (approximately 30 to 45 minutes).
